zh.lifeSummary: 當Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon於大約1055年出生在法國利姆辛豪-維安藍可時，他的父親Géraud de Rançon31歲，母親Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne26歲。他與Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1104年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon于大约1055年出生在法国利姆辛豪-維安藍可时，他的父亲Géraud de Rançon31岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne26岁。他与Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1104年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rancon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lançon): diminutive of Lance ‘lance, spear’, or perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived in a thickly wooded area, or a metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, from Old French lançon ‘branch of a tree’. Compare Lanson .
French (Lançon): habitational name from the town so named, in Bouches-du-Rhône.

variants.name: Lanson
meanings: French: variant of Lançon (see Lancon 1 and 2) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (or an altered form of Lancon 3). This surname is also found in England, where it is of Huguenot origin.
English: variant of   Langston  , itself probably a variant of   Langton  .

variants.name: Lance
meanings: English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Lanzo, originally a short form of various compound names with the first element land ‘land, territory’ (for example, Lambert ), but later used as an independent name. It was introduced to England by the Normans, for whom it was a popular name among the ruling classes, perhaps partly because of association with Old French lance ‘lance, spear’ (see 2 below).
French: metonymic occupational name for a soldier who carried a lance, or a nickname for a skilled fighter, from Old French lance ‘lance, spear’.
Americanized form of German   Lanz   and   Lenz  .

nameMeanings.name: Aimeri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim (mainly Iran and Afghanistan): surname denoting descent from or association with someone called   Amer  .

variants.name: Amer
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation; the name of Cú Chulainn's beloved, a woman of many talents who was blessed with beauty, wisdom, and chastity. It was revived as a given name in the 20th century.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon was born about 1055, in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, his father, Géraud de Rançon, was 31 and his mother, Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne, was 26. He married Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1104, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon est né environ 1055, à Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, son père, Géraud de Rançon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1104, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon um 1055 in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géraud de Rançon 31 und seine Mutter Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne 26. Er hat Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1104 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon è nato il circa 1055 nel Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, il suo padre, Géraud de Rançon, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1104, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aimeri III Malemort de Ranconが約1055年にフランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンランコンで生まれた時，父Géraud de Rançonは31歳，母Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenneは26歳であった。Bourgondie de Craon de Neversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1104年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon(이)가 대략 1055년 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 랭콘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géraud de Rançon(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1104년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon nasceu aproximadamente 1055, em Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França, seu pai, Géraud de Rançon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1104, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon родился около 1055 г. в местности ранкон, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция, его отцу по имени Géraud de Rançon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1104 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon nació aproximadamente 1055, en Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, su papá, Géraud de Rançon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Autrey Comtesse de Beaumont-sur-Vigenne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1104, a la edad de 50 años.
